user_story_groups.story: When I paste Symphony or another source again, future Codex runs should detect the prior source record and avoid redoing the same scout work.

When I need provenance for the Symphony integration direction, I should see that Symphony is scheduler/runtime inspiration while Codexter remains normal Codex plus installed skills and ProofPacket output.
When a source inspires several features, I should be able to inspect one source record and follow it to feature records, scout runs, research memos, and tickets without raw transcript bloat.

summary: The source registry cleanly separates source provenance from feature inventory, validates locally, and teaches harness-scout to check SRC records before source-run folders or FEAT dedupe. It directly preserves the user's Symphony/Codexter boundary: Symphony can launch normal Codex in a Codexter-installed workspace, while Codexter routes skills and writes proof.

finding_log.summary: Top-level README and ARCHITECTURE source-registry links were not included in this slice to avoid sweeping unrelated pre-existing dirty hunks into the commit.
evidence: The registry is discoverable through docs/sources/README.md, docs/features/README.md, and harness-scout workflow docs.
The workspace already had unrelated dirty README/ARCHITECTURE changes before this ticket.
finding_log.next_action: Add top-level source-registry links in a later clean doc-navigation slice if they are still missing after the current dirty doc work is reconciled.

rubric_sections.name: user-intent-satisfaction
findings: The implementation gives future agents a concrete way to remember Symphony and other sources without re-scouting or confusing source provenance with feature records.
rubric_sections.next_action: Use the source registry in future harness-scout passes.

rubric_sections.name: evidence-quality
findings: Validation commands cover the new source registry, the existing feature registry, ticket metadata, Python syntax, and whitespace.
rubric_sections.next_action: Keep command output linked from the ticket Evidence section.

rubric_sections.name: integration-readiness
findings: The new validator checks local artifacts and FEAT references, and harness-scout now names the source registry before source-run and feature dedupe.
rubric_sections.next_action: Proceed to commit this ticket slice.

rubric_sections.name: debloatability
findings: The change avoids building a crawler, database, vector store, or raw transcript archive and keeps the feature/source split explicit.
rubric_sections.next_action: Do not expand beyond JSONL plus validator until repeated source volume proves the need.
